blur_detection.description: The text and edges are sharp with no apparent blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots are present that obscure the text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations are detected.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles are present.

cut_off_detection.description: No document edges are cut off, and the image frame includes all necessary portions.

missing_sections.description: All parts of the receipt/invoice appear to be present and complete.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements are obstructing the document content.

classification.error_type: File location is not same as project's location
classification.error_message: The document location is Honolulu, USA, which does not match the expected location of Indonesia.
classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumerRecipient, transactionAmount, transactionDate, paymentMethod, and itemDescriptionLineItems. The presence of these fields, along with the evidence of payment completed, confirms it as an expense document. The expense type is classified as 'meals' based on the item descriptions (TL CAPPUCCINO, TL ICD CARAML MCCH).

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 6 out of 8 required fields, including evidence of payment completed, actual amounts charged/paid, and payment confirmation, which meets the criteria for an expense document.

extraction.supplier_location: STARBUCKS T1 A18 #75/99, DANIEL K INOUYE AIRPRT, 21800 HONOLULU
extraction.special_notes: We value your feedback! Scan the QR code to share your experience.

issues.description: Missing mandatory customer name on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Document must show vendor name or merchant name that provided goods/services

issues.description: Missing mandatory invoice number on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Document must show purchase date when transaction occurred

issues.description: Total amount is in USD, but should be in local currency (IDR)
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Document must show amount and currency - total amount must match submitted expense amount

issues.description: Personal meals during business trip are taxable BIK - subject to gross-up
issues.recommendation: Personal meals during business trip are taxable BIK - subject to gross-up. Business lunch/entertainment with client/prospect client/vendor is non-taxable
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Personal meals during business trip are taxable BIK - subject to gross-up. Business lunch/entertainment with client/prospect client/vendor is non-taxable

issues.description: Name of clients/vendor in the expense report for business meal with clients/vendor must be provided
issues.recommendation: Please provide the name of clients/vendor in the expense report for business meal with clients/vendor
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Name of clients/vendor in the expense report for business meal with clients/vendor must be provided

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has several compliance issues including missing mandatory fields (customer name, invoice number), incorrect currency, and tax implications for personal meals. Additionally, the name of clients/vendor for business meals must be provided.
